allow: Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Documents\\WDP\\be" && node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\({path:'.env'}\);const mongoose=require\('mongoose'\);mongoose.connect\(process.env.MONGO_URI\).then\(async\(\)=>{const P=require\('./src/models/Product'\);const total=await P.countDocuments\(\);const active=await P.countDocuments\({listingStatus:'active'}\);const withStock=await P.countDocuments\({stock:{gt:0}}\);const sample=await P.findOne\(\).lean\(\);console.log\('Total:',total,'Active:',active,'Stock>0:',withStock\);if\(sample\){console.log\('Sample:',sample.title,'|status:',sample.listingStatus,'|stock:',sample.stock,'|sellerId:',sample.sellerId\);}process.exit\(0\);}\)" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Documents\\WDP\\be" && node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\({path:'.env'}\);const mongoose=require\('mongoose'\);mongoose.connect\(process.env.MONGO_URI\).then\(async\(\)=>{const User=require\('./src/models/User'\);const emails=['seedadmin@wdp.com','techstore@wdp.com','buyer1@wdp.com'];for\(const email of emails\){const u=await User.findOne\({email}\).select\('email role status isEmailVerified passwordHash'\).lean\(\);if\(u\)console.log\(u.email,'|',u.role,'|',u.status,'|verified:',u.isEmailVerified,'|hasPass:',!!u.passwordHash\);else console.log\(email,'NOT FOUND'\);}process.exit\(0\);}\)" 2>&1)
